sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n918" key="a)grodo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγρο-δότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄγρα</etym>) <sense id="n918.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giver of game</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δαίμονες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.27</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
